seoTitle: Papunya vs Pellew Islands — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Papunya and Pellew Islands. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Papunya vs Pellew Islands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Papunya and Pellew Islands.
heading: Papunya vs Pellew Islands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Papunya, Northern Territory and Pellew Islands, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Papunya has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Pellew Islands (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Papunya or Pellew Islands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Papunya has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Pellew Islands scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Papunya scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Pellew Islands scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Papunya or Pellew Islands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Papunya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
